ON WNRTC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_RAE_NET_REVENUE SRNR
ON WNRTC.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID = SRNR.SK_NET_REVENUE_ID
AND WNRTC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SRNR.SS_CD
AND WNRTC.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID = SRNR.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_REV_LINES_RAO WNGL
ON WNRTC.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID = WNGL.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID
AND WNRTC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = WNGL.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_REV_RULE_RAO WNGAR
ON WNRTC.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID =  WNGAR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID
AND WNRTC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = WNGAR.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_REV_SLS_CR_FLG_RAO WSCF
ON WNRTC.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID = WSCF.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID
AND WNRTC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = WSCF.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT ENGLA
ON ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY = WNRTC.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
/* use st_m_ra_rules for rule_id : rchettri
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_ACCOUNTING_RULE NAAR
on NAAR.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME   = WNGAR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
*/
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RA_RULES SMRR_RULE
ON SMRR_RULE.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
AND SMRR_RULE.NAME  = WNGAR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RA_RULES SMRR_CUR
ON SMRR_CUR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
AND SMRR_CUR.NAME  = WNRTC.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
ON WNRTC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
ON NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
ON (NP.ITEM_KEY = WNRTC.ITEM_KEY )
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_SO_GLOBAL_NAME EL_GNAME
ON EL_GNAME.ORG_ID = WNRTC.ORG_ID
AND EL_GNAME.ACTIVE_IND = 'Y'
LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP  SC_TV
ON SC_TV.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT =  WSCF.LINE_ID
AND SC_TV.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = WSCF.SOURCE_TYPE
AND SC_TV.SS_CD =  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP  SC_TV_ORIG
ON SC_TV_ORIG.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT =  WSCF.LINE_ID
AND SC_TV_ORIG.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = WSCF.SOURCE_TYPE
AND SC_TV_ORIG.SS_CD =  EL_GNAME.ORIG_SS_CD
AND NOT EXISTS  /* knarlapu: added to pick only CG record in case of same line  exixts in CG and Non-CG */
(SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP X WHERE  SC_TV_ORIG.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT =  X.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT
AND SC_TV_ORIG.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = X.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD
AND X.SS_CD = 'CG'  )
/* XAAS SALES CREDITING CHANGES*/
LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP_XAAS  SC_TV_XAAS
ON SC_TV_XAAS.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY =  WNRTC.RU_PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
AND SC_TV_XAAS.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = WSCF.SOURCE_TYPE
/*AND SC_TV_XAAS.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT>0*/
/* AND (SC_TV_XAAS.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT>0 OR SC_TV_XAAS.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT<-1000000000) *//*SK_TRX_SC_ID BIG INT CHANGE Q1FY18*/
AND WNRTC.RU_PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY>0 /*ADDED THIS CONDITION FOR NOT BLOATING OF TSV TRXNS*/
/*ACCRUAL CHANGES FEB19*/
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RAO_XXCFI_RAE_NET_REVENUE EL
ON WNRTC.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID = EL.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID
AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME  = EL.GLOBAL_NAME
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL_TSV
ON EL.TSV_LINE_REF_NUM=CAST(NSOL_TSV.BK_LINE_REF_NUM AS BIGINT)
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO_TSV
ON NSOL_TSV.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSO_TSV.SALES_ORDER_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_ACRL_SNAP_XAAS SC_TV_TSV
ON EL.TSV_LINE_REF_NUM=SC_TV_TSV.SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT
AND NSO_TSV.BK_WEB_ORDER_ID=SC_TV_TSV.WEB_ORDER_ID
/* AND (SC_TV_TSV.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT>0 OR SC_TV_TSV.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT<-1000000000) */
AND EL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID<0

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL_SC  /* Q1 changes */
ON SC_TV.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT = NSOL_SC.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
AND SC_TV.SS_CD = NSOL_SC.SS_CODE
AND SC_TV.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'O'
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL_SC_ORIG
ON SC_TV_ORIG.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT = NSOL_SC_ORIG.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
AND SC_TV_ORIG.SS_CD = NSOL_SC_ORIG.SS_CODE
AND SC_TV_ORIG.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'O'
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO_SC
ON NSOL_SC.SALES_ORDER_KEY = SSO_SC.SALES_ORDER_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO_SC_ORIG
ON NSOL_SC_ORIG.SALES_ORDER_KEY = SSO_SC_ORIG.SALES_ORDER_KEY
/* Commented as part of sales credit logic change*/
/*LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_CREDIT_TYPES ESCT
on ESCT.SK_CREDIT_TYPE_ID = SC_TV.EP_SK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID_INT
AND ESCT.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
*/
/* Added as part of sales credit logic change*/
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_TV NSCTT
ON SC_TV.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE = NSCTT.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE
AND NSCTT.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01'
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_TV NSCTT_ORIG
ON SC_TV_ORIG.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE = NSCTT_ORIG.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE
AND NSCTT_ORIG.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01'
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_TV NSCTT_TSV
ON SC_TV_TSV.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE = NSCTT_TSV.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE
AND NSCTT_TSV.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01'
/* START: ADDED AS PART OF AUS MIGRATION */
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO_DFLT_SC
ON WNGL.ORDER_NUMBER = NSO_DFLT_SC.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT
AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NSO_DFLT_SC.SS_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO_DFLT_SC
ON NSO_DFLT_SC.SALES_ORDER_KEY = SSO_DFLT_SC.SALES_ORDER_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO_DFLT_SC_CAL
ON WNGL.ORDER_NUMBER = NSO_DFLT_SC_CAL.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT
AND EL_GNAME.ORIG_SS_CD = NSO_DFLT_SC_CAL.SS_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO_DFLT_SC_CAL
ON NSO_DFLT_SC_CAL.SALES_ORDER_KEY = SSO_DFLT_SC_CAL.SALES_ORDER_KEY
/* END: ADDED AS PART OF AUS MIGRATION */

/* INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_MONTH_PROCESS_DATE EAMPD
ON WNRTC.FISCAL_ID = EAMPD.FISCAL_ID
*/
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM
ON  WNRTC.FISCAL_ID = NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT*100 + NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT
/*arajanal : added for SAAS Q1FY15*/
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
ON NAT.AR_TRX_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_KEY
LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS
ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_REP ESP_XAAS
ON ESP_XAAS.SALES_REP_NUMBER=SC_TV_XAAS.BK_SALES_REP_NUM
AND ESP_XAAS.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY    EST_INIT_VAR2
ON EST_INIT_VAR2.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=SC_TV_XAAS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
AND EST_INIT_VAR2.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_CREDIT_TYPES ESCT_INIT_VAR2
ON ESCT_INIT_VAR2.NAME  = SC_TV_XAAS.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE
AND ESCT_INIT_VAR2.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_TV NSCTT_XAAS
ON SC_TV_XAAS.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE = NSCTT_XAAS.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE
AND NSCTT_XAAS.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01'
/*ADDED AS PART OF ACCRUAL CHANGES TO DERIVE SALES CREDITING COLUMNS FOR TSV DATA*/
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_REP ESP_TSV
ON ESP_TSV.SALES_REP_NUMBER=SC_TV_TSV.BK_SALES_REP_NUM
AND ESP_TSV.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY    EST_INIT_VAR2_TSV
ON EST_INIT_VAR2_TSV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=SC_TV_TSV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
AND EST_INIT_VAR2_TSV.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_CREDIT_TYPES ESCT_INIT_VAR2_TSV
ON ESCT_INIT_VAR2_TSV.NAME  = SC_TV_TSV.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE
AND ESCT_INIT_VAR2_TSV.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
WHERE
1=1
AND  WSCF.SALES_CREDIT_FLAG = 'N'
AND WNRTC.XAAS_OA_FLAG='N' /*Added as part of NGCCRM-XAAS-OA Q1FY16 to restrict the XAAS-OA data*/
/*Added the below code for processing OA-OM data:Q3FY16-OA*/
UNION ALL
SELECT
WNRTC.ACCOUNT_CLASS,
ENGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE AS ACCOUNT_CODE,
CASE WHEN WNGAR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID IS NOT NULL THEN SMRR_RULE.RULE_ID
ELSE SMRR_CUR.RULE_ID
END AS  ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID,
/*WNGAR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,*/
CASE WHEN WNGAR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID IS NOT NULL THEN WNGAR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
ELSE WNRTC.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME
END AS  ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
WNRTC.ACCTD_AMOUNT AS ACCTD_AMOUNT,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
WNRTC.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID AS ADJUSTMENT_ID,
WNRTC.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID AS ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER,
'RAE_REVENUE' AS ADJUSTMENT_TYPE,
WNRTC.AMOUNT AS AMOUNT,
1 AS BATCH_ID,
NULL AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
NULL AS BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
WNRTC.CODE_COMBINATION_ID AS CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
NULL AS COGS_PERCENT,
NULL AS COMMENTS,
WNRTC.CONTEXT AS CONTEXT,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS CREATE_DATETIME,
1 AS CREATED_BY,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS CREATION_DATE,
NULL AS CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID,
WNRTC.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT AS CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
WNRTC.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT AS CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
WSCF.SALES_CREDIT_FLAG AS DEFAULT_SC_FLAG,
NULL AS EXTENDED_AMOUNT ,
'REV' AS EXTRACT_TYPE,
WNRTC.FISCAL_ID AS FISCAL_ID,
'F' AS FORWARD_REVERSE_FLAG,
WNRTC.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE AS FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE,
current_timestamp(0)    AS GES_UPDATE_DATE,
WNRTC.GL_DATE AS GL_DATE,
WNRTC.GL_POSTED_DATE AS GL_POSTED_DATE,
NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME AS GLOBAL_NAME,
NULL AS GROUPING_ID ,
NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT AS INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
WNRTC.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE AS INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE,
NULL AS INVOICE_PERCENT,
NULL AS INVOICING_RULE_ID,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
1 AS LAST_UPDATED_BY,
'Y' AS LATEST_RECORD_FLAG,
WNRTC.INVOICE_PERCENT AS LINE_PERCENT,
CASE  WHEN (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('WEBEX','SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX')
OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS') /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL */ 
OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT','ICMS-ADJ') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME LIKE ANY ('%XAAS%'))) )
THEN SC_TV_XAAS.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT
ELSE COALESCE(SC_TV.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT,SC_TV_ORIG.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT) END AS LINE_SEQ_ID  ,
NULL AS LINE_TYPE,
NULL AS LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID,
CASE  WHEN COALESCE(SC_TV.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,SC_TV_ORIG.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD) ='O' THEN COALESCE(SSO_SC.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT,SSO_SC_ORIG.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT)
ELSE COALESCE(SSO_DFLT_SC.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT,SSO_DFLT_SC_CAL.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT)
END   AS ORDER_HEADER_ID ,
CASE WHEN  WNGL.LINE_ID = -9999  THEN
CASE WHEN COALESCE(SC_TV.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,SC_TV_ORIG.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD) = 'O' THEN COALESCE(SC_TV.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT,SC_TV_ORIG.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT)
ELSE NULL
END
ELSE WNGL.LINE_ID
END AS ORDER_LINE_ID  ,
WNGL.ORDER_NUMBER AS ORDER_NUMBER   ,
WNRTC.ORG_ID AS ORG_ID,
NULL AS PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
NULL AS PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
CASE WHEN (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX')
OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS')  /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/
OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT','ICMS-ADJ') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME LIKE ANY ('%XAAS%'))) )
THEN
COALESCE(NSCTT_XAAS.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_QUOTA_FLAG,'=')
ELSE
COALESCE(COALESCE(NSCTT.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_QUOTA_FLAG,NSCTT_ORIG.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_QUOTA_FLAG),'=') END AS QUOTA_FLAG ,
NULL AS REASON_CODE,
NULL AS REBATE_AMOUNT,
NULL AS REBATE_PERCENTAGE_ID,
CASE WHEN WNRTC.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLG = 'Y' THEN NULL ELSE 999  END AS REQUEST_ID,
CASE WHEN WNGAR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID IS NOT NULL THEN WNGAR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE
ELSE WNRTC.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE
END AS  RULE_START_DATE,
CASE WHEN (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('WEBEX','SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX')
OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS') /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/ 
OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT','ICMS-ADJ') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME LIKE ANY ('%XAAS%'))) )
THEN COALESCE(ESCT_INIT_VAR2.SK_CREDIT_TYPE_ID,0) ELSE
COALESCE(SC_TV.EP_SK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID_INT,SC_TV_ORIG.EP_SK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID_INT) END AS SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID ,
CASE WHEN (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('WEBEX','SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX')
OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS')  /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/ 
OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT','ICMS-ADJ') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME LIKE ANY ('%XAAS%'))) )THEN COALESCE(ESP_XAAS.SALES_REP_ID,0) /*ARAJANAL : added for SAAS Q1FY15*/
ELSE COALESCE(SC_TV.EP_SK_SALESREP_ID_INT,SC_TV_ORIG.EP_SK_SALESREP_ID_INT) END AS SALESREP_ID ,
NULL AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
NULL AS SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
NULL AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
WSCF.SOURCE_TYPE AS SOURCE_TYPE ,
CASE WHEN (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX')
OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS') /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/
OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT','ICMS-ADJ') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME LIKE ANY ('%XAAS%'))) )
THEN SC_TV_XAAS.SPLIT_PCT
ELSE
COALESCE(SC_TV.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,SC_TV_ORIG.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT) END      AS SPLIT_PERCENT ,
CASE WHEN (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('WEBEX','SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX')
OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS') /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/
OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT','ICMS-ADJ') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME LIKE ANY ('%XAAS%'))) ) THEN COALESCE(EST_INIT_VAR2.TERRITORY_ID,  0)
ELSE COALESCE(SC_TV.EP_SK_TERRITORY_ID_INT,SC_TV_ORIG.EP_SK_TERRITORY_ID_INT)   END   AS TERRITORY_ID ,
/*CASE WHEN CURRENT_DATE <= EAMPD.END_DATE   THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) ELSE EAMPD.END_DATE END AS TRANSACTION_DATE , */
CASE WHEN CURRENT_DATE <= NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE   THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) ELSE CAST ( NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0) )
END AS TRANSACTION_DATE ,
'O' AS TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE,
/*SUB_ALL.ORDER_QUANTITY AS TRANSACTION_QUANTITY  ,*/
CASE WHEN WNRTC.MERAKI_FLAG='Y' THEN NMRT.MERAKI_TRX_QTY ELSE SUB_ALL.ORDER_QUANTITY END AS TRANSACTION_QUANTITY,
WNRTC.AR_TRX_DATETIME AS TRX_DATE,
NULL AS TRX_NAME,
WNRTC.BK_AR_TRX_NUMBER AS TRX_NUMBER,
WNRTC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE AS TRX_TYPE,
NULL AS UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,
NULL AS UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE,
'RAE_REVENUE' AS SOURCE_CD,
SRNR.NET_REVENUE_KEY AS SOURCE_KEY,
CASE WHEN (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('WEBEX','SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX')
OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS') /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/
OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT','ICMS-ADJ') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME LIKE ANY ('%XAAS%'))) )  THEN SC_TV_XAAS.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE ELSE
COALESCE(SC_TV.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,SC_TV_ORIG.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE) END AS BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE   ,
CASE WHEN (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('WEBEX','SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX')
OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS') /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/
OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT','ICMS-ADJ') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME LIKE ANY ('%XAAS%'))) )    THEN SC_TV_XAAS.BK_SALES_REP_NUM
ELSE COALESCE(SC_TV.SALES_REP_NUMBER,SC_TV_ORIG.SALES_REP_NUMBER)  END  SALES_REP_NUMBER
/*ARAJANAL: ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY15*/ /*KGUVVALA : modified for XAAS as part of Q2FY15*/,
CASE WHEN (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('WEBEX','SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX')
OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS') /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/
OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT','ICMS-ADJ') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME LIKE ANY ('%XAAS%'))) )    THEN SC_TV_XAAS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
ELSE COALESCE(SC_TV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,SC_TV_ORIG.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY)  END SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
WNRTC.SK_TRX_ID_INT, /*Added as part of OA Q1FY16*/
WNRTC.XAAS_OA_FLAG,/*Added as part of OA Q1FY16*/
CASE WHEN (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('WEBEX','SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX')
OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS') /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/
OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT','ICMS-ADJ') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME LIKE ANY ('%XAAS%'))) ) THEN -999 ELSE  COALESCE(SC_TV.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT,SC_TV_ORIG.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT) END AS SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT,
WNRTC.SOURCE_DATA_KEY5,
WNRTC.TSV_FLAG,
WNRTC.MERAKI_FLAG
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_REV_CUR_RAO WNRTC
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REV_EXT_SUB_OA_S SUB_ALL
ON WNRTC.SK_TRX_ID_INT = CAST(SUB_ALL.ATTRIBUTE2 AS BIGINT)
AND SUB_ALL. APPLICATION_NAME='Cisco Offer Attribution'  /*NRS Change*/ /*CHANGED TO LEFT JOIN AS PART OF MERAKI*/
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
ON WNRTC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_RAE_NET_REVENUE SRNR
ON WNRTC.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID = SRNR.SK_NET_REVENUE_ID
AND WNRTC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SRNR.SS_CD
AND WNRTC.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID = SRNR.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_REV_LINES_RAO WNGL
ON WNRTC.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID = WNGL.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID
AND WNRTC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = WNGL.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_REV_RULE_RAO WNGAR
ON WNRTC.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID =  WNGAR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID
AND WNRTC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = WNGAR.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_REV_SLS_CR_FLG_RAO WSCF
ON WNRTC.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID = WSCF.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID
AND WNRTC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = WSCF.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT ENGLA
ON ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY = WNRTC.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RA_RULES SMRR_RULE
ON SMRR_RULE.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
AND SMRR_RULE.NAME  = WNGAR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RA_RULES SMRR_CUR
ON SMRR_CUR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
AND SMRR_CUR.NAME  = WNRTC.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
ON WNRTC.RU_PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
ON NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
ON (NP.ITEM_KEY = WNRTC.ITEM_KEY )
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_SO_GLOBAL_NAME EL_GNAME
ON EL_GNAME.ORG_ID = WNRTC.ORG_ID
AND EL_GNAME.ACTIVE_IND = 'Y'
LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP  SC_TV
ON SC_TV.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT =  WSCF.LINE_ID
AND SC_TV.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = WSCF.SOURCE_TYPE
AND SC_TV.SS_CD =  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP  SC_TV_ORIG
ON SC_TV_ORIG.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT =  WSCF.LINE_ID
AND SC_TV_ORIG.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = WSCF.SOURCE_TYPE
AND SC_TV_ORIG.SS_CD =  EL_GNAME.ORIG_SS_CD
AND NOT EXISTS  /* knarlapu: added to pick only CG record in case of same line  exixts in CG and Non-CG */
(SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP X WHERE  SC_TV_ORIG.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT =  X.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT
AND SC_TV_ORIG.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = X.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD
AND X.SS_CD = 'CG'  )
/* XAAS SALES CREDITING CHANGES*/
LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP_XAAS  SC_TV_XAAS
ON SC_TV_XAAS.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY =  WNRTC.RU_PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
AND SC_TV_XAAS.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = WSCF.SOURCE_TYPE
/*AND SC_TV_XAAS.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT>0 */
/* AND (SC_TV_XAAS.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT>0 OR SC_TV_XAAS.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT<-1000000000) *//*SK_TRX_SC_ID BIG INT CHANGE Q1FY18*/
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL_SC  /* Q1 changes */
ON SC_TV.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT = NSOL_SC.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
AND SC_TV.SS_CD = NSOL_SC.SS_CODE
AND SC_TV.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'O'
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL_SC_ORIG
ON SC_TV_ORIG.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT = NSOL_SC_ORIG.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
AND SC_TV_ORIG.SS_CD = NSOL_SC_ORIG.SS_CODE
AND SC_TV_ORIG.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'O'
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO_SC
ON NSOL_SC.SALES_ORDER_KEY = SSO_SC.SALES_ORDER_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO_SC_ORIG
ON NSOL_SC_ORIG.SALES_ORDER_KEY = SSO_SC_ORIG.SALES_ORDER_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_TV NSCTT
ON SC_TV.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE = NSCTT.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE
AND NSCTT.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01'
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_TV NSCTT_ORIG
ON SC_TV_ORIG.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE = NSCTT_ORIG.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE
AND NSCTT_ORIG.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01'
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_TV NSCTT_XAAS
ON SC_TV_XAAS.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE = NSCTT_XAAS.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE
AND NSCTT_XAAS.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01' /* START: ADDED AS PART OF AUS MIGRATION */
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO_DFLT_SC
ON WNGL.ORDER_NUMBER = NSO_DFLT_SC.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT
AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NSO_DFLT_SC.SS_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO_DFLT_SC
ON NSO_DFLT_SC.SALES_ORDER_KEY = SSO_DFLT_SC.SALES_ORDER_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO_DFLT_SC_CAL
ON WNGL.ORDER_NUMBER = NSO_DFLT_SC_CAL.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT
AND EL_GNAME.ORIG_SS_CD = NSO_DFLT_SC_CAL.SS_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO_DFLT_SC_CAL
ON NSO_DFLT_SC_CAL.SALES_ORDER_KEY = SSO_DFLT_SC_CAL.SALES_ORDER_KEY
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM
ON  WNRTC.FISCAL_ID = NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT*100 + NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
ON NAT.AR_TRX_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_KEY
LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS
ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_REP ESP_XAAS
ON ESP_XAAS.SALES_REP_NUMBER=SC_TV_XAAS.BK_SALES_REP_NUM
AND ESP_XAAS.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY    EST_INIT_VAR2
ON EST_INIT_VAR2.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=SC_TV_XAAS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
AND EST_INIT_VAR2.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_CREDIT_TYPES ESCT_INIT_VAR2
ON ESCT_INIT_VAR2.NAME  = SC_TV_XAAS.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE
AND ESCT_INIT_VAR2.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
/*ADDED AS PART OF MERAKI CHANGES*/   
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RAO_XXCFI_RAE_NET_REVENUE EL_RAO
ON  EL_RAO.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID=WNRTC.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID
AND EL_RAO.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,OFFER_ATTR_ID_INT,MERAKI_TRX_QTY FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_MERAKI_REVENUE_TRX  
WHERE ATTRIBUTION_CD='ATTRIBUTED' GROUP BY 1,2,3)NMRT
ON WNRTC.RU_PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NMRT.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
AND CAST(EL_RAO.LINE_ID AS INTEGER)=NMRT.OFFER_ATTR_ID_INT
WHERE 1=1 AND  WSCF.SALES_CREDIT_FLAG = 'N' AND WNRTC.XAAS_OA_FLAG='O'
AND (SUB_ALL.ATTRIBUTE2 IS NOT NULL OR (NMRT.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL AND NMRT.OFFER_ATTR_ID_INT IS NOT NULL))

SELECT
 WNRTC.ACCOUNT_CLASS,
 ENGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE AS ACCOUNT_CODE,
COALESCE(SMRR_RULE.RULE_ID, SMRR_CUR.RULE_ID) AS  ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID,
COALESCE(WNGAR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME, WNRTC.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME ) AS  ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
 WNRTC.ACCTD_AMOUNT AS ACCTD_AMOUNT,
 'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
 WNRTC.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID AS ADJUSTMENT_ID,
 WNRTC.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID AS ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER,
 'RAE_REVENUE' AS ADJUSTMENT_TYPE,
 WNRTC.AMOUNT AS AMOUNT,
 1 AS BATCH_ID,
 NULL AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
 NULL AS BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
 WNRTC.CODE_COMBINATION_ID AS CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
 NULL AS COGS_PERCENT,
 NULL AS COMMENTS,
 WNRTC.CONTEXT AS CONTEXT,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS CREATE_DATETIME,
 1 AS CREATED_BY,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS CREATION_DATE,
 NULL AS CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID,
 WNRTC.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT AS CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
 WNRTC.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT AS CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
 'Y' AS DEFAULT_SC_FLAG,
 NULL AS EXTENDED_AMOUNT ,
 'REV' AS EXTRACT_TYPE,
 WNRTC.FISCAL_ID AS FISCAL_ID,
 'F' AS FORWARD_REVERSE_FLAG,
 WNRTC.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE AS FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE,
 current_timestamp(0)    AS GES_UPDATE_DATE,
 WNRTC.GL_DATE AS GL_DATE,
 WNRTC.GL_POSTED_DATE AS GL_POSTED_DATE,
 NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME AS GLOBAL_NAME,
 NULL AS GROUPING_ID ,
 NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT AS INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
 WNRTC.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE AS INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE,
 NULL AS INVOICE_PERCENT,
 NULL AS INVOICING_RULE_ID,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
 1 AS LAST_UPDATED_BY,
 'Y' AS LATEST_RECORD_FLAG,
 WNRTC.INVOICE_PERCENT AS LINE_PERCENT,
 NULL        AS LINE_SEQ_ID  ,  
 NULL       AS LINE_TYPE,
 NULL        AS LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID,
-9999 AS  ORDER_HEADER_ID , 
-9999  AS  ORDER_LINE_ID  , 
-9999    AS ORDER_NUMBER   ,
 WNRTC.ORG_ID AS ORG_ID,
 NULL AS PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
 NULL AS PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
'Y' AS QUOTA_FLAG ,  
 NULL AS REASON_CODE,
 NULL AS REBATE_AMOUNT,
 NULL AS REBATE_PERCENTAGE_ID,
 CASE WHEN WNRTC.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLG = 'Y' THEN NULL ELSE 999  END AS REQUEST_ID,
 COALESCE(WNGAR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE,WNRTC.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE) AS  RULE_START_DATE,
 0 AS SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID ,  
 0 AS SALESREP_ID ,  
 NULL AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
 NULL AS SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
 NULL AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
 CASE WHEN WNRTC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'CM' THEN 'C' ELSE 'I' END SOURCE_TYPE,  
 100       AS SPLIT_PERCENT ,     
 0   AS TERRITORY_ID ,  
 CASE WHEN CURRENT_DATE <= NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE   THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) ELSE CAST ( NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0) )
  END AS TRANSACTION_DATE , 
 'O' AS TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE, 
 /*SUB_ALL.ORDER_QUANTITY AS TRANSACTION_QUANTITY  , */
 CASE WHEN WNRTC.TSV_FLAG='Y' THEN NART.ACCRUAL_TRX_QTY ELSE SUB_ALL.ORDER_QUANTITY END AS TRANSACTION_QUANTITY,
 WNRTC.AR_TRX_DATETIME AS TRX_DATE,
 NULL AS TRX_NAME,
 WNRTC.BK_AR_TRX_NUMBER AS TRX_NUMBER,
 WNRTC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE AS TRX_TYPE,
 NULL AS UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,
 NULL AS UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE,
 'RAE_REVENUE' AS SOURCE_CD,
 SRNR.NET_REVENUE_KEY AS SOURCE_KEY,
 'Direct Sales' AS BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,   
 'UNKNOWN' AS SALES_REP_NUMBER,
 EST_INIT_VAR2.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
WNRTC.SK_TRX_ID_INT, /*Added as part of OA Q1FY16*/ 
WNRTC.XAAS_OA_FLAG, /*Added as part of OA Q1FY16*/ 
-999 AS SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT,
  WNRTC.SOURCE_DATA_KEY5,
  WNRTC.TSV_FLAG,
  WNRTC.MERAKI_FLAG
 FROM 
 $$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_REV_CUR_RAO WNRTC
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REV_EXT_SUB_OA_S SUB_ALL
 ON WNRTC.SK_TRX_ID_INT = SUB_ALL.ATTRIBUTE2  
AND SUB_ALL. APPLICATION_NAME='Cisco Offer Attribution'  /*NRS Change*/ /*CHANGED THE JOIN TO LEFT OUTER FOR TSV*/
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
 ON WNRTC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_RAE_NET_REVENUE SRNR
 ON WNRTC.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID = SRNR.SK_NET_REVENUE_ID
 AND WNRTC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SRNR.SS_CD
  AND WNRTC.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID = SRNR.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_REV_RULE_RAO WNGAR
 ON WNRTC.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID =  WNGAR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID
 AND WNRTC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = WNGAR.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
/* PRMADDAL: ADDED BELOW JOIN FOR SC IMPLEMENTATION*/  
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_REV_SLS_CR_FLG_RAO WSCF
ON WNRTC.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID = WSCF.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID
AND WNRTC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = WSCF.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT ENGLA
  ON ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY = WNRTC.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RA_RULES SMRR_RULE 
  ON SMRR_RULE.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
  AND SMRR_RULE.NAME  = WNGAR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RA_RULES SMRR_CUR 
  ON SMRR_CUR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
  AND SMRR_CUR.NAME  = WNRTC.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
  ON (NP.ITEM_KEY = WNRTC.ITEM_KEY ) 
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM 
  ON  WNRTC.FISCAL_ID = NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT*100 + NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT  
/*Added the below to derive the Sales Territory Key*/  
 LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_SHIPTO_CUSTOMER_PARTY_HIER MSC 
 ON WNRTC.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY=MSC.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
 LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC 
    ON (NIC.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE=MSC.BRANCH_ISO_COUNTRY_CD)
 LEFT OUTER  JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_APSP_SALES_TERRITORY_MAP STMAP  
    ON STMAP.SALES_COUNTRY_NAME=NIC.ISO_COUNTRY_NAME
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY    EST_INIT_VAR2               
    ON EST_INIT_VAR2.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=COALESCE(STMAP.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,(SELECT SALES_TERRITORY_KEY FROM $$STGDB.WI_APSP_SALES_TERRITORY_MAP  WHERE SALES_COUNTRY_NAME='UNITED STATES'))
    AND EST_INIT_VAR2.GLOBAL_NAME = 'CG'
/*ADDED THESE JOINS AS PART OF TSV CHANGES*/	
INNER JOIN 	$$ETLVWDB.EL_RAO_XXCFI_RAE_NET_REVENUE EL
ON WNRTC.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID = EL.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID
AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = EL.GLOBAL_NAME
LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT SK_LINE_REF_NUM,OFFR_ATTR_ID_INT,ACCRUAL_TRX_QTY FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ACCRUED_REV_TRX  
WHERE ATTRIBUTION_CD='ATTRIBUTED' GROUP BY 1,2,3)NART
ON EL.TSV_LINE_REF_NUM=NART.SK_LINE_REF_NUM
AND CAST(EL.LINE_ID AS INTEGER)=NART.OFFR_ATTR_ID_INT	
 WHERE 1=1
AND  WSCF.SALES_CREDIT_FLAG = 'Y' 
AND WNRTC.XAAS_OA_FLAG='Y'
AND (SUB_ALL.ATTRIBUTE2 IS NOT NULL OR (NART.SK_LINE_REF_NUM IS NOT NULL AND NART.OFFR_ATTR_ID_INT IS NOT NULL))

SELECT
   WNRTC.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID
   ,WNRTC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
   ,WNRTC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE
   ,WNRTC.CONTEXT
   ,'I'  SOURCE_TYPE
   , NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
   ,'N'  METRIX_FLAG                             
   ,'N' SALES_CREDIT_FLAG
   FROM
   $$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_REV_CUR_RAO WNRTC
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
   ON WNRTC.BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   WHERE WNRTC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('CM','DM')
   
   /* OA Q1FY15 Release */  
   AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM  $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP  X 
       WHERE WNRTC.RU_PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
       AND NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT  = X.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT
       AND X.SS_CD = NATL.SS_CODE         
       AND X.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'I')  
   /* OA Q1FY15 Release */ 
    
   AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_REV_SLS_CR_FLG_RAO Y 
  WHERE  WNRTC.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID = Y.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID 
   AND WNRTC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = Y.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
 AND WNRTC.XAAS_OA_FLAG='N'/*Added as part of NGCCRM-XAAS-OA Q1FY16 to restrict the XAAS-OA data*/
 
 UNION ALL
 
SELECT
   WNRTC.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID
   ,WNRTC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
   ,WNRTC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE
   ,WNRTC.CONTEXT
   ,'I'  SOURCE_TYPE
   , NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
   ,'N'  METRIX_FLAG                             
   ,'N' SALES_CREDIT_FLAG
   FROM
   $$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_REV_CUR_RAO WNRTC
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
   ON WNRTC.RU_PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   INNER JOIN (SELECT PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,SK_TRX_ID_INT,SK_PREVIOUS_TRX_ID_INT 
   FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE NOA  WHERE NOA.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG='N' GROUP BY 1,2,3) NOA
   ON WNRTC.SK_PREVIOUS_TRX_ID_INT = NOA.SK_TRX_ID_INT
   WHERE WNRTC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('CM','DM')
   /* OA Q1FY15 Release */  
   AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM  $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP  X 
       WHERE WNRTC.RU_PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NOA.PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
       AND NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT  = X.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT
       AND X.SS_CD = NATL.SS_CODE         
       AND X.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'I')  
   /* OA Q1FY15 Release */ 
    
   AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_REV_SLS_CR_FLG_RAO Y 
  WHERE  WNRTC.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID = Y.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID 
   AND WNRTC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = Y.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
 AND WNRTC.XAAS_OA_FLAG='O'/*Added as part of NGCCRM-XAAS-OA Q1FY16 to restrict the XAAS-OA data*/

SELECT 
  WNRTC.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID ,
  WNRTC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE,
  WNRTC.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME,
  WNRTC.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE, 
  CASE WHEN (WNRTC.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS','DISPUTE','ICMS-ADJ','SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX', 'WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX' /*,'XAAS','ICMS-XAAS'*/)
  OR WNRTC.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS') /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/ )
  /* kguvvala - Added as part of XAAS-Q3FY16 */
       THEN CASE WHEN 
                 CASE WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS' THEN NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID 
                 ELSE NP.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID 
                 END <> 'UNKNOWN' 
            THEN WNRTC_P.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME  
            ELSE WNRTC.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME 
            END
 ELSE  WNRTC.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME          
 END AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
  
 CASE WHEN (WNRTC.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS','DISPUTE','ICMS-ADJ','SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX', 'WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX' /*,'XAAS','ICMS-XAAS'*/)
 OR WNRTC.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS') /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/)
   /* kguvvala - Added as part of XAAS-Q3FY16 */
      THEN  CASE WHEN
                 CASE WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS' THEN NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID 
                 ELSE NP.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID 
                 END <> 'UNKNOWN' 
           THEN WNRTC_P.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE
           ELSE WNRTC.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE
           END
 ELSE WNRTC.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE
 END AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE
 
  FROM
  $$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_REV_CUR_RAO WNRTC
  INNER JOIN  (SELECT SK_TRX_ID_INT,SK_PREVIOUS_TRX_ID_INT,RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME,RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE
  FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_REV_CUR_RAO  GROUP BY 1,2,3,4)WNRTC_P
  ON WNRTC.SK_PREVIOUS_TRX_ID_INT=WNRTC_P.SK_TRX_ID_INT 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
  ON WNRTC.ITEM_KEY = NP.ITEM_KEY
  WHERE
   WNRTC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'CM' 
  AND (WNRTC.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME IS NULL  OR  WNRTC.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME  = 'UNKNOWN')
  AND WNRTC.XAAS_OA_FLAG='Y'
  AND WNRTC.TSV_FLAG='N' /*ACRL CHANGES TO RESTRICT TSV DATA*/

SELECT 
  WNRTC.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID ,
  WNRTC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE,
  WNRTC.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME,
  WNRTC.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE, 
  CASE WHEN (WNRTC.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS', 'DISPUTE','ICMS-ADJ','SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX', 'WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX')
  OR WNRTC.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS') /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/) 
   /* kguvvala - Added as part of XAAS-Q3FY16 */
  THEN
     CASE WHEN WNRTC.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE='REVENUE TRANSFER' THEN
      NII.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME       
     ELSE
      CASE WHEN 
       CASE WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS' THEN NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID ELSE NP.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID END <> 'UNKNOWN' THEN 
        NATIL.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME  
       ELSE NULL 
      END
     END
   WHEN UPPER(WNRTC.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) LIKE 'ORDER MANAGEMENT%'  
    OR UPPER(WNRTC.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) = 'SERVICE RMA' 
    OR UPPER(WNRTC.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) IN ( 'T4C SALES ADJ' , 'T4C - SERVICE CM')
    OR UPPER(WNRTC.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) = 'FSO METRIX' 
   THEN
     CASE WHEN 
      CASE WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS' THEN NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID ELSE NP.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID END <> 'UNKNOWN' THEN 
       NATIL.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME  
      ELSE NULL
     END
   ELSE  WNRTC.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME          
  END AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
  CASE WHEN (WNRTC.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS', 'DISPUTE','ICMS-ADJ','SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX', 'WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX')
  OR WNRTC.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS') /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/) 
   /* kguvvala - Added as part of XAAS-Q3FY16 */
  THEN
     CASE WHEN WNRTC.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE='REVENUE TRANSFER' THEN
        WNRTC_1.GL_DATE       
      ELSE
       CASE WHEN
        CASE WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS' THEN NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID ELSE NP.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID END <> 'UNKNOWN' THEN
        NATIL.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE
        ELSE WNRTC.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE
       END
     END
   WHEN UPPER(WNRTC.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) LIKE 'ORDER MANAGEMENT%'   
     OR UPPER(WNRTC.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) = 'SERVICE RMA' 
     OR UPPER(WNRTC.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) IN ( 'T4C SALES ADJ' , 'T4C - SERVICE CM')
     OR UPPER(WNRTC.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) = 'FSO METRIX' 
   THEN
    CASE  WHEN 
      CASE WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS' THEN NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID ELSE NP.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID END <> 'UNKNOWN' THEN 
       NATIL.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE   
      ELSE WNRTC.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE
    END
   ELSE WNRTC.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE
  END AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE
  FROM
  $$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_REV_CUR_RAO WNRTC
  INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_REV_VAL_RAO WNRTC_1    
  ON WNRTC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNRTC_1.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL_ADJ
  ON NATL_ADJ.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNRTC.BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
  ON NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL_ADJ.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
  ON WNRTC.ITEM_KEY = NP.ITEM_KEY
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM NII 
  ON NP.ITEM_KEY = NII.ITEM_KEY
  AND NII.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT = 1
  WHERE
   WNRTC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'CM' 
  /* AND WNRTC.RU_BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_KEY < 0  */
  AND (WNRTC.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME IS NULL  OR  WNRTC.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME  = 'UNKNOWN')
  AND WNRTC.XAAS_OA_FLAG='N' /*Added as part of NGCCRM-XAAS-OA Q1FY16 to restrict the XAAS-OA data*/ 
  AND WNRTC.TSV_FLAG='N' /*ACRL CHANGES TO RESTRICT TSV DATA*/  
 
 /*Added for OA-OM Flow*/
  UNION ALL
  
  SELECT 
  WNRTC.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID ,
  WNRTC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE,
  WNRTC.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME,
  WNRTC.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE, 
CASE WHEN 
                 CASE WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS' THEN NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID 
                 ELSE NP.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID 
                 END <> 'UNKNOWN' 
            THEN WNRTC_P.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME  
            ELSE WNRTC.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME 
            END
 AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
CASE WHEN
                 CASE WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS' THEN NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID 
                 ELSE NP.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID 
                 END <> 'UNKNOWN' 
           THEN WNRTC_P.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE
           ELSE WNRTC.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE
           END
 AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE
  FROM
  $$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_REV_CUR_RAO WNRTC
  INNER JOIN  (SELECT SK_TRX_ID_INT,SK_PREVIOUS_TRX_ID_INT,RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME,RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE
  FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_REV_CUR_RAO  GROUP BY 1,2,3,4)WNRTC_P
  ON WNRTC.SK_PREVIOUS_TRX_ID_INT=WNRTC_P.SK_TRX_ID_INT 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
  ON WNRTC.ITEM_KEY = NP.ITEM_KEY
  WHERE
   WNRTC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'CM' 
  AND (WNRTC.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME IS NULL  OR  WNRTC.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME  = 'UNKNOWN')
  AND WNRTC.XAAS_OA_FLAG='O'
  AND WNRTC.TSV_FLAG='N' /*ACRL CHANGES TO RESTRICT TSV DATA*/

SELECT
  EOXRNR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID 
  ,NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
  ,NAT.BK_AR_TRX_NUMBER              
  ,NAT.AR_TRX_DATETIME
  ,NAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT
  ,NULL AS CONTEXT
  ,NAT.RU_BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_KEY         
 ,NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE 
 ,NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE
  ,NAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
  ,NAT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
  ,NAT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY             
 ,EOXRNR.CURRENCY_CODE AS TRXL_CURR_CODE
  ,EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE   
  ,NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE
  ,NAT.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLG
  ,-7777 AS BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
  ,-9999  AS SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT 
  ,NP.ITEM_KEY  AS ITEM_KEY 
  ,NATL_PAR.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE 
 ,SUB_ALL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
 ,SUB_ALL.RULE_START_DATE
  ,NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME          
 ,EOXRNR.GL_DATE AS  GL_DATE
   ,NATL_PAR.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE
  ,CAST(EOXRNR.DV_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS REV_PCT
 ,EOXRNR.GL_POSTED_DATE AS GL_POSTED_DT 
  ,ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
  ,EOXRNR.DV_AMOUNT AS AMOUNT 
  ,EOXRNR.DV_ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT AS ACCTD_AMOUNT
  ,-7777 AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
  ,NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
  ,EOXRNR.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
  ,EAMPD.FISCAL_ID
  ,EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT AS ORG_ID
  ,CAST(CAST( TRIM(EOXRNR.DV_PERCENT) AS VARCHAR(18) ) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS INVOICE_PERCENT
  ,EOXRNR.CURRENCY_CODE AS TRXL_CURR_CODE
  ,NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
  ,'REV' AS ACCOUNT_CLASS
  ,NATL_PAR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS RU_PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  ,'O' AS XAAS_OA_FLAG
  ,EOXRNR.ROL_TRANSACTION_ID AS SK_TRX_ID_INT/*Added as part of OA-NGCCRM-XAAS Q1FY16*/   
 ,SUB_ALL.ATTRIBUTE6 AS SK_PREVIOUS_TRX_ID_INT /*Added as part of OA-NGCCRM-XAAS Q1FY16*/
 ,EOXRNR.SOURCE_DATA_KEY5
 ,EOXRNR.TSV_FLAG
 ,EOXRNR.MERAKI_FLAG
  FROM
  $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_MONTH_PROCESS_DATE EAMPD,
  $$ETLVWDB.EL_RAO_XXCFI_RAE_NET_REVENUE EOXRNR
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
    ON EOXRNR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_RAE_NET_REVENUE SRNR
    ON EOXRNR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID = SRNR.SK_NET_REVENUE_ID
    AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SRNR.SS_CD
    AND EOXRNR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID = SRNR.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
   ON SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT  = EOXRNR.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID 
   AND SATL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
 INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL_PAR
   ON SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL_PAR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
   ON NATL_PAR.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT
   ON NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
   AND NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
   AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
   ON NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = EOXRNR.LEDGER_ID
   AND NSOB.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY  EOUGC
   ON NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE= EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE              
   AND NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY    = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY     
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT  ENGLA  
   ON (ENGLA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = EOXRNR.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
   AND ENGLA.GLOBAL_NAME = EOXRNR.GLOBAL_NAME )
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS 
   ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REV_EXT_SUB_OA_S SUB_ALL
   ON EOXRNR.ROL_TRANSACTION_ID = SUB_ALL.ATTRIBUTE2  
 AND SUB_ALL.APPLICATION_NAME='Cisco Offer Attribution'  /*NRS Change*/
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
   ON NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID=SUB_ALL.SKU
 WHERE 1=1 
  AND EOXRNR.GL_POSTED_DATE IS NOT NULL 
  AND COALESCE(EOXRNR.GL_POSTED_FLAG, 'N') = 'Y'
  AND NAT.AR_TRX_COMPLETE_FLAG = 'Y'  
  AND EOXRNR.GLOBAL_NAME  = 'CG'
  --AND NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('S')
 AND EOXRNR.GL_DATE  BETWEEN EAMPD.START_DATE AND EAMPD.END_DATE 
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_LEDGER EAL WHERE EOXRNR.LEDGER_ID = EAL.LEDGER_ID)
  AND  NOT EXISTS 
              ( SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV DRVDR 
      WHERE DRVDR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY = SRNR.NET_REVENUE_KEY
      AND DRVDR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='RAE_REVENUE')
  AND NOT EXISTS 
             ( SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_BKG DRVDBKG  
     WHERE DRVDBKG.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY = SRNR.NET_REVENUE_KEY
     AND DRVDBKG.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='RAE_REVENUE')
 AND NATL_PAR.RU_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_FLG='Y'
 AND EOXRNR.XAAS_OFFER_ATTRIB_FLG='N'
 AND EOXRNR.MERAKI_FLAG='N' /*ADDED TO RESTRICT MERAKI DATA*/
  UNION 
  SELECT
  EOXRNR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID 
  ,NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
  ,NAT.BK_AR_TRX_NUMBER              
  ,NAT.AR_TRX_DATETIME
  ,NAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT
  ,NULL AS CONTEXT 
  ,NAT.RU_BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_KEY         
 ,NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE 
 ,NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE  
  ,NAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
  ,NAT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
  ,NAT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY             
 ,EOXRNR.CURRENCY_CODE AS TRXL_CURR_CODE
  ,EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE   
  ,NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE
  ,NAT.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLG
  ,-7777 AS BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  ,-9999  AS SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
  ,NP.ITEM_KEY  AS ITEM_KEY 
  ,NATL_PAR.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE
  ,SUB_ALL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME 
  ,SUB_ALL.RULE_START_DATE
  ,NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME          
  ,EOXRNR.GL_DATE AS  GL_DATE
  ,NATL_PAR.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE
  ,CAST(EOXRNR.ATTRIBUTE2 AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS REV_PCT
  ,EOXRNR.GL_POSTED_DATE AS GL_POSTED_DT 
  ,ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
  ,EOXRNR.AMOUNT
  ,EOXRNR.ACCTD_AMOUNT
  ,-7777 AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
  ,NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
  ,EOXRNR.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
  ,NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT*100 + NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT as FISCAL_ID
  ,EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT AS ORG_ID
  ,CAST(CAST( TRIM(EOXRNR.ATTRIBUTE2) AS VARCHAR(18) ) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS INVOICE_PERCENT
  ,EOXRNR.CURRENCY_CODE AS TRXL_CURR_CODE
  ,NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
  ,'REV' AS ACCOUNT_CLASS
  ,NATL_PAR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS RU_PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  ,'O' AS XAAS_OA_FLAG
  ,EOXRNR.LINE_NUM_ATTRIBUTE5 AS SK_TRX_ID_INT
 ,SUB_ALL.ATTRIBUTE6 AS SK_PREVIOUS_TRX_ID_INT 
 ,EOXRNR.SOURCE_DATA_KEY5
 ,EOXRNR.TSV_FLAG
 ,EOXRNR.MERAKI_FLAG
  FROM
  /* $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_MONTH_PROCESS_DATE EAMPD, */
  $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM ,
  $$EXCEPDB.EX_NCR_RAE_REV_CUR_RAO EOXRNR
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
    ON EOXRNR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RAO_XXCFI_RAE_NET_REVENUE EL_RAO
  ON EL_RAO.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID=EOXRNR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID
  AND EL_RAO.GLOBAL_NAME=EOXRNR.GLOBAL_NAME
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_RAE_NET_REVENUE SRNR
    ON EOXRNR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID = SRNR.SK_NET_REVENUE_ID
    AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SRNR.SS_CD
    AND EOXRNR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID = SRNR.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
   ON SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT  = EOXRNR.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID 
   AND SATL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
 INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL_PAR
   ON SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL_PAR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
   ON NATL_PAR.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT
  ON NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
  AND NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
  AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
   ON NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = EOXRNR.LEDGER_ID
   AND NSOB.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY  EOUGC
   ON NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE= EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE              
   AND NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY    = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY     
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT  ENGLA
   ON (ENGLA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = EOXRNR.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
   AND ENGLA.GLOBAL_NAME = EOXRNR.GLOBAL_NAME )
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS 
   ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY   
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REV_EXT_SUB_OA_S SUB_ALL
   ON EOXRNR.LINE_NUM_ATTRIBUTE5 = SUB_ALL.ATTRIBUTE2  
 AND SUB_ALL. APPLICATION_NAME='Cisco Offer Attribution'  /*NRS Change*/ 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
   ON NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID=SUB_ALL.SKU
 WHERE 1=1
  AND EL_RAO.GL_POSTED_DATE IS NOT NULL 
  AND COALESCE(EL_RAO.GL_POSTED_FLAG, 'N') = 'Y'
  AND NAT.AR_TRX_COMPLETE_FLAG = 'Y'  
  AND EOXRNR.GLOBAL_NAME  = 'CG'
 AND EL_RAO.GL_DATE BETWEEN NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE and NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE 
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_LEDGER EAL WHERE EOXRNR.LEDGER_ID = EAL.LEDGER_ID)
  AND  NOT EXISTS 
              ( SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV DRVDR 
     WHERE DRVDR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY = SRNR.NET_REVENUE_KEY
     AND DRVDR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='RAE_REVENUE')
  AND NOT EXISTS 
             ( SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_BKG DRVDBKG  
     WHERE DRVDBKG.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY = SRNR.NET_REVENUE_KEY
     AND DRVDBKG.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='RAE_REVENUE')
     AND NATL_PAR.RU_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_FLG='Y'
  AND EOXRNR.XAAS_OFFER_ATTRIB_FLG='N'
  AND EOXRNR.MERAKI_FLAG='N' /*ADDED TO RESTRICT MERAKI DATA*/

SELECT
  WNRTC.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID
  ,WNRTC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
  ,WNRTC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE
  ,WNRTC.CONTEXT
  ,'I'  SOURCE_TYPE
  , NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
  ,'N'  METRIX_FLAG                             
  ,'N' SALES_CREDIT_FLAG
  FROM
  $$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_REV_CUR_RAO WNRTC
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
  ON WNRTC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  WHERE WNRTC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'DM'
  
  /* OA Q1FY15 Release */  
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM  $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP  X 
      WHERE WNRTC.RU_PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
      AND NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT  = X.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT
      AND X.SS_CD = NATL.SS_CODE         
      AND X.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'I')  
  /* OA Q1FY15 Release */ 
   
  AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_REV_SLS_CR_FLG_RAO Y
  WHERE  WNRTC.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID = Y.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID 
  AND WNRTC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = Y.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
  AND WNRTC.XAAS_OA_FLAG='N' /*Added as part of NGCCRM-XAAS-OA Q1FY16 to restrict the XAAS-OA data*/
  
  UNION ALL
SELECT
  WNRTC.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID
  ,WNRTC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
  ,WNRTC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE
  ,WNRTC.CONTEXT
  ,'I'  SOURCE_TYPE
  , NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
  ,'N'  METRIX_FLAG                             
  ,'N' SALES_CREDIT_FLAG
  FROM
  $$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_REV_CUR_RAO WNRTC
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
  ON WNRTC.RU_PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  WHERE WNRTC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'DM'
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM  $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP  X 
      WHERE WNRTC.RU_PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
      AND NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT  = X.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT
      AND X.SS_CD = NATL.SS_CODE         
      AND X.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'I')  
  AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_REV_SLS_CR_FLG_RAO Y
  WHERE  WNRTC.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID = Y.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID 
  AND WNRTC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = Y.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
  AND WNRTC.XAAS_OA_FLAG='O'

SELECT  DISTINCT 
 EOXRNR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID, 
 EOXRNR.GL_DATE, 
 EOXRNR.GL_POSTED_DATE, 
 EOXRNR.DV_AMOUNT AS AMOUNT, 
 EOXRNR.DV_ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT AS ACCTD_AMOUNT, 
 EOXRNR.CODE_COMBINATION_ID, 
 EOXRNR.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID, 
 NULL AS NCR_EXTRACTED_FLAG, 
 EOXRNR.ORG_ID, 
 EOXRNR.DV_PERCENT AS ATTRIBUTE2, 
 EOXRNR.GLOBAL_NAME, 
 EOXRNR.EDW_CREATE_DTM, 
 EOXRNR.EDW_UPDATE_DTM ,
 EOXRNR.ADJUSTMENT_ACCOUNTING_ID   ,
 EOXRNR.DISTRIBUTION_TYPE    ,
 EOXRNR.LEDGER_ID      ,
 EOXRNR.EVENT_ID,
 EOXRNR.CURRENCY_CODE, /*Added as part of OA-NGCCRM-XAAS Q1FY16*/
 EOXRNR.ROL_TRANSACTION_ID AS LINE_NUM_ATTRIBUTE5,/*Added as part of OA-NGCCRM-XAAS Q1FY16*/
 EOXRNR.XAAS_OFFER_ATTRIB_FLG/*Added as part of OA-NGCCRM-XAAS Q1FY16*/
,EOXRNR.SOURCE_DATA_KEY5
,EOXRNR.TSV_FLAG
,EOXRNR.MERAKI_FLAG
FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_REV_CUR_RAO WI
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
 ON WI.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE  = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_RAO_XXCFI_RAE_NET_REVENUE EOXRNR
 ON WI.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID = EOXRNR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID
 AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME  = EOXRNR.GLOBAL_NAME
WHERE 
EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_ITM EXI
  WHERE EXI.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = WI.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT   
   AND EXI.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
  )   
OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_FRT EXF
   WHERE EXF.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = WI.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT    
   AND EXF.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
  )   
/*OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_ASN EXA
   WHERE  EXA.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = WI.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT    
   AND EXA.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
  )*/

SELECT
   WNRTC.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID ,
   WNRTC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE, 
     /*ARAJANAL: ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY15*/
    /*KGUVVALA : modified for XAAS as part of Q2FY15*/ 
   CASE WHEN (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX') 
   OR NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS') /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/ ) THEN -9999
   /* Included NSOLV.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT as part of Q3FY15 OM LSS CR */ 
   WHEN COALESCE(NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT,NSOLV.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT,NSOL_CAL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT) IS NOT NULL THEN COALESCE(NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT,NSOLV.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT,NSOL_CAL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT) 
    ELSE
           CASE WHEN EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID <= 0 OR EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID IS NULL THEN  
           CASE WHEN WNRTC.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE IN ('CM','DM') THEN 0 WHEN WNRTC.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = 'INV' THEN -9999 END
       ELSE EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID END
    END AS LINE_ID,
    /* Included NSO1.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT as part of Q3FY15 OM LSS CR */ 
   CASE WHEN COALESCE(NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,NSO1.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,NSO_CAL.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT) IS NOT NULL THEN COALESCE(NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,NSO1.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,NSO_CAL.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT)
    ELSE
     /* COALESCE(NSO_AR.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,0) : RCHETTRI */
     CASE WHEN WNRTC.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE IN ('CM','DM')  AND NSO_AR.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT < 0 THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(NSO_AR.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,0) END
    END AS ORDER_NUMBER
   FROM
   $$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_REV_CUR_RAO WNRTC
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
   ON WNRTC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_ORD_LN EORCTLOL
   ON EORCTLOL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = WNRTC.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
   AND EORCTLOL.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME 
   /* START: ADDED AS PART OF AUS MIGRATION */
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
   ON NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID
   AND NSOL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
    /* Included as part of Q3FY15 OM LSS CR */ 
    LEFT OUTER JOIN (
    SELECT * FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ABS(SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT), SS_CODE, ORIGINATED_QTC_VIA_CG1_FLG 
    ORDER BY SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT ASC)=1 ) NSOLV
    ON  ABS(NSOLV.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT) = ABS(EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID)
    AND NSOLV.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
    AND NSOLV.ORIGINATED_QTC_VIA_CG1_FLG = 'Y'
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO
   ON NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY
   /* Included as part of Q3FY15 OM LSS CR */ 
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL1
   ON NSOL1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOLV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO1
   ON NSOL1.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO1.SALES_ORDER_KEY
   
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_SO_GLOBAL_NAME EL_GNAME
   ON EL_GNAME.ORG_ID = WNRTC.ORG_ID
   AND EL_GNAME.ACTIVE_IND = 'Y'  
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL_CAL
   ON NSOL_CAL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID
   AND NSOL_CAL.SS_CODE = EL_GNAME.ORIG_SS_CD
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO_CAL
   ON NSOL_CAL.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO_CAL.SALES_ORDER_KEY
   /* END: ADDED AS PART OF AUS MIGRATION */ 
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
   ON NAT.AR_TRX_KEY = WNRTC.AR_TRX_KEY
   INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO_AR
   ON NAT.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO_AR.SALES_ORDER_KEY  
   /*ARAJANAL: ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY15*/
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS
   ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY=NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
  WHERE WNRTC.XAAS_OA_FLAG='N' /*Added as part of NGCCRM-XAAS-OA Q1FY16 to restrict the XAAS-OA data*/   
  /*Added the below code for RAE-OA-OM*/
 UNION ALL 
 
  SELECT
   WNRTC.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID ,
   WNRTC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE, 
     /*ARAJANAL: ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY15*/
    /*KGUVVALA : modified for XAAS as part of Q2FY15*/ 
   CASE WHEN (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX')
   OR NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS') /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/ ) THEN -9999
   /* Included NSOLV.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT as part of Q3FY15 OM LSS CR */ 
   WHEN COALESCE(NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT,NSOLV.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT) IS NOT NULL THEN COALESCE(NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT,NSOLV.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT) 
    ELSE
           CASE WHEN EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID <= 0 OR EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID IS NULL THEN  
           CASE WHEN WNRTC.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE IN ('CM','DM') THEN 0 WHEN WNRTC.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = 'INV' THEN -9999 END
       ELSE EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID END
    END AS LINE_ID,
    /* Included NSO1.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT as part of Q3FY15 OM LSS CR */ 
   CASE WHEN COALESCE(NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,NSO1.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT) IS NOT NULL THEN COALESCE(NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,NSO1.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT)
    ELSE
     /* COALESCE(NSO_AR.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,0) : RCHETTRI */
     CASE WHEN WNRTC.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE IN ('CM','DM')  AND NSO_AR.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT < 0 THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(NSO_AR.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,0) END
    END AS ORDER_NUMBER
   FROM
   $$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_REV_CUR_RAO WNRTC
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
   ON WNRTC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
 ON NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=WNRTC.RU_PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_ORD_LN EORCTLOL
   ON EORCTLOL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
   AND EORCTLOL.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME 
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
   ON NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID
   AND NSOL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
    LEFT OUTER JOIN (
    SELECT * FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ABS(SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT), SS_CODE, ORIGINATED_QTC_VIA_CG1_FLG 
    ORDER BY SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT ASC)=1 ) NSOLV
    ON  ABS(NSOLV.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT) = ABS(EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID)
    AND NSOLV.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
    AND NSOLV.ORIGINATED_QTC_VIA_CG1_FLG = 'Y'
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO
   ON NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY   
   /* Included as part of Q3FY15 OM LSS CR */ 
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL1
   ON NSOL1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOLV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO1
   ON NSOL1.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO1.SALES_ORDER_KEY
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
   ON NAT.AR_TRX_KEY = WNRTC.AR_TRX_KEY
   INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO_AR
   ON NAT.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO_AR.SALES_ORDER_KEY  
   /*ARAJANAL: ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY15*/
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS
   ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY=NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
  WHERE WNRTC.XAAS_OA_FLAG='O' /*Added as part of NGCCRM-XAAS-OA Q1FY16 to restrict the XAAS-OA data*/                   
  UNION ALL 
 
  SELECT
   WNRTC.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID ,
   WNRTC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE, 
     /*ARAJANAL: ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY15*/
    /*KGUVVALA : modified for XAAS as part of Q2FY15*/ 
   CASE WHEN (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX')
   OR NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS') /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/ ) THEN -9999
   /* Included NSOLV.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT as part of Q3FY15 OM LSS CR */ 
   WHEN COALESCE(NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT,NSOLV.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT) IS NOT NULL THEN COALESCE(NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT,NSOLV.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT) 
    ELSE
           CASE WHEN EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID <= 0 OR EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID IS NULL THEN  
           CASE WHEN WNRTC.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE IN ('CM','DM') THEN 0 WHEN WNRTC.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = 'INV' THEN -9999 END
       ELSE EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID END
    END AS LINE_ID,
    /* Included NSO1.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT as part of Q3FY15 OM LSS CR */ 
   CASE WHEN COALESCE(NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,NSO1.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT) IS NOT NULL THEN COALESCE(NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,NSO1.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT)
    ELSE
     /* COALESCE(NSO_AR.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,0) : RCHETTRI */
     CASE WHEN WNRTC.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE IN ('CM','DM')  AND NSO_AR.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT < 0 THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(NSO_AR.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,0) END
    END AS ORDER_NUMBER
   FROM
   $$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_REV_CUR_RAO WNRTC
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
   ON WNRTC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
 ON NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=WNRTC.RU_PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_ORD_LN EORCTLOL
   ON EORCTLOL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
   AND EORCTLOL.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME 
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
   ON NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID
   AND NSOL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
    LEFT OUTER JOIN (
    SELECT * FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ABS(SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT), SS_CODE, ORIGINATED_QTC_VIA_CG1_FLG 
    ORDER BY SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT ASC)=1 ) NSOLV
    ON  ABS(NSOLV.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT) = ABS(EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID)
    AND NSOLV.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
    AND NSOLV.ORIGINATED_QTC_VIA_CG1_FLG = 'Y'
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO
   ON NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY   
   /* Included as part of Q3FY15 OM LSS CR */ 
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL1
   ON NSOL1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOLV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO1
   ON NSOL1.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO1.SALES_ORDER_KEY
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
   ON NAT.AR_TRX_KEY = WNRTC.AR_TRX_KEY
   INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO_AR
   ON NAT.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO_AR.SALES_ORDER_KEY  
   /*ARAJANAL: ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY15*/
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS
   ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY=NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
  WHERE WNRTC.XAAS_OA_FLAG='Y' /*Added as part of NGCCRM-XAAS-OA Q1FY19 to ALLOW the XAAS-OA data*/

SELECT
  EOXRNR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID 
  ,NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
  ,NAT.BK_AR_TRX_NUMBER              
  ,NAT.AR_TRX_DATETIME
  ,NAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT
  ,NULL AS CONTEXT 
  ,NAT.RU_BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_KEY         
  ,COALESCE(NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE 
  ,NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE,     
  CASE WHEN NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY < 0 THEN NSOL_FINAL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY 
       ELSE
       CASE WHEN NATL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY > 0  THEN NATL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
              ELSE NAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END
  END AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY, 
  CASE WHEN NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY < 0 THEN NSO.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY 
       ELSE NAT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY  END
   AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
   CASE WHEN NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY < 0 THEN NSOL_FINAL.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY 
       ELSE NAT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY  END  
   AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY	   
  ,EOXRNR.CURRENCY_CODE AS TRXL_CURR_CODE
  ,EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE   
  ,NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE
  ,NAT.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLG
  ,NATL.BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
  ,NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
  ,CASE WHEN NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY<0 THEN NART.PRODUCT_KEY ELSE 
  CASE WHEN NATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE = 'LINE' THEN NATIL.PRODUCT_KEY  WHEN NATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE = 'FREIGHT' THEN NATFL.PRODUCT_KEY ELSE NULL END  END ITEM_KEY
  ,NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE 
  ,CASE WHEN NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY<0 THEN NART.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME ELSE NATIL.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME END AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
  ,CASE WHEN NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY<0 THEN NART.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT ELSE NATIL.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE END AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE
  ,NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME 
  ,CAST(EOXRNR.GL_DATE AS DATE) AS  GL_DATE
  ,NATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE
  ,CAST(EOXRNR.DV_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS REV_PCT
  ,EOXRNR.GL_POSTED_DATE AS GL_POSTED_DT 
  ,ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
  ,EOXRNR.DV_AMOUNT AS AMOUNT /* enabled this as this is already calculated in EL table */
  ,EOXRNR.DV_ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT AS ACCTD_AMOUNT  /* enabled this as this is already calculated in EL table */ 
  ,NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
  ,NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
  ,EOXRNR.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
  ,EAMPD.FISCAL_ID
  ,CASE WHEN NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY<0 THEN EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT ELSE EOUGC_REG.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT END AS ORG_ID
  ,CAST(CAST( TRIM(EOXRNR.DV_PERCENT) AS VARCHAR(18) ) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS INVOICE_PERCENT
  ,EOXRNR.CURRENCY_CODE AS TRXL_CURR_CODE
  ,CASE WHEN NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY<0 THEN NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY ELSE NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY END AS SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
  ,'REV' AS ACCOUNT_CLASS
  ,COALESCE(NATIL.RU_PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,NATFL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY) AS RU_PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  ,'N' AS XAAS_OA_FLAG
  ,-999 AS SK_TRX_ID_INT
  ,-999 AS SK_PREVIOUS_TRX_ID_INT
  ,EOXRNR.SOURCE_DATA_KEY5 
  ,EOXRNR.TSV_FLAG
  ,EOXRNR.MERAKI_FLAG
 FROM
  $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_MONTH_PROCESS_DATE EAMPD,
  $$ETLVWDB.EL_RAO_XXCFI_RAE_NET_REVENUE EOXRNR
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
   ON EOXRNR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_RAE_NET_REVENUE SRNR
   ON EOXRNR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID = SRNR.SK_NET_REVENUE_ID
   AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SRNR.SS_CD
    AND EOXRNR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID = SRNR.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
   ON SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT  = EOXRNR.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
   AND SATL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
  INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
   ON SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
   ON NATL.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY    
  INNER JOIN (SELECT  CASE WHEN NSOLV.SK_ORIGINAL_LINE_REF_NUM=(-999) THEN CAST(NSOL_INIT.BK_LINE_REF_NUM AS BIGINT)
        ELSE NSOLV.SK_ORIGINAL_LINE_REF_NUM  END AS ORIGINAL_LINE_REF_NUM,
        NSOL_INIT.BK_LINE_REF_NUM,NSOL_INIT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
        FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV NSOLV
        INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL_INIT
        ON NSOLV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSOL_INIT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
        AND NSOLV.END_TV_DTM='3500-01-01 00:00:00') NSOL1
        ON EOXRNR.TSV_LINE_REF_NUM=CAST(NSOL1.BK_LINE_REF_NUM AS BIGINT)
  INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL_FINAL
  ON NSOL1.ORIGINAL_LINE_REF_NUM=CAST(NSOL_FINAL.BK_LINE_REF_NUM AS BIGINT)
  INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO
  ON NSOL_FINAL.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY  
  
  INNER JOIN (SELECT SK_LINE_REF_NUM,PRODUCT_KEY,ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,MIN(ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT) AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT      
  FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ACCRUED_REV_TRX  WHERE ATTRIBUTION_CD='STANDALONE' GROUP BY 1,2,3) NART
  ON EOXRNR.TSV_LINE_REF_NUM=NART.SK_LINE_REF_NUM
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS 
   ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT
   ON NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
   AND NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
   AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
      ON NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = EOXRNR.LEDGER_ID
      AND NSOB.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY  EOUGC_REG
   ON NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE= EOUGC_REG.BK_COMPANY_CODE              
   AND NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY    = EOUGC_REG.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
   AND NAT.AR_TRX_KEY>0
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY  EOUGC
   ON NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY= EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
   AND NAT.AR_TRX_KEY<0   
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT  ENGLA  
       ON (ENGLA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = EOXRNR.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
       AND ENGLA.GLOBAL_NAME = EOXRNR.GLOBAL_NAME )
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
   ON NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_FREIGHT_LINE NATFL
   ON NATFL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  WHERE 1=1 
  AND EOXRNR.GL_POSTED_DATE IS NOT NULL 
  AND COALESCE(EOXRNR.GL_POSTED_FLAG, 'N') = 'Y'
  AND 
  (NAT.AR_TRX_COMPLETE_FLAG = 'Y'  OR NAT.AR_TRX_KEY<0)
  AND EOXRNR.GLOBAL_NAME  = 'CG'
  AND EOXRNR.GL_DATE  BETWEEN EAMPD.START_DATE AND EAMPD.END_DATE
  AND (EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT IS NOT NULL OR EOUGC_REG.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT IS NOT NULL)
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_LEDGER EAL WHERE EOXRNR.LEDGER_ID = EAL.LEDGER_ID)
   AND  NOT EXISTS 
              ( SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV DRVDR 
      WHERE DRVDR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY = SRNR.NET_REVENUE_KEY
      AND DRVDR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='RAE_REVENUE')
   AND NOT EXISTS 
             ( SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_BKG DRVDBKG  
     WHERE DRVDBKG.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY = SRNR.NET_REVENUE_KEY
     AND DRVDBKG.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='RAE_REVENUE')
 /*AND NATL.RU_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_FLG <>'Y' */
 AND EOXRNR.XAAS_OFFER_ATTRIB_FLG<>'Y'/*Added as part of Q1FY16-Offer Attribution to restrict XAAS data*/
 AND EOXRNR.TSV_FLAG='Y' /*ACRL CHANGES*/
  UNION 
  SELECT
  EOXRNR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID 
  ,NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
  ,NAT.BK_AR_TRX_NUMBER              
  ,NAT.AR_TRX_DATETIME
  ,NAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT
  ,NULL AS CONTEXT 
  ,NAT.RU_BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_KEY         
  ,COALESCE(NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE 
  ,NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE,           
 CASE WHEN NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY < 0 THEN NSOL_FINAL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY 
       ELSE
       CASE WHEN NATL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY > 0  THEN NATL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
              ELSE NAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END
  END AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY, 
  CASE WHEN NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY < 0 THEN NSO.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY 
       ELSE NAT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY  END
   AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
   CASE WHEN NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY < 0 THEN NSOL_FINAL.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY 
       ELSE NAT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY  END  
   AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY	   

  ,EOXRNR.CURRENCY_CODE AS TRXL_CURR_CODE
   ,EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE   
  ,NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE
  ,NAT.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLG
  ,NATL.BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
  ,NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
 ,CASE WHEN NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY<0 THEN NART.PRODUCT_KEY ELSE 
  CASE WHEN NATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE = 'LINE' THEN NATIL.PRODUCT_KEY  WHEN NATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE = 'FREIGHT' THEN NATFL.PRODUCT_KEY ELSE NULL END  END ITEM_KEY
  ,NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE 
  ,CASE WHEN NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY<0 THEN NART.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME ELSE NATIL.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME END AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
  ,CASE WHEN NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY<0 THEN NART.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT ELSE NATIL.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE END AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE
  ,NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME 
       
  ,EOXRNR.GL_DATE AS  GL_DATE
  ,NATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE
  ,CAST(EOXRNR.ATTRIBUTE2 AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS REV_PCT
  ,EOXRNR.GL_POSTED_DATE AS GL_POSTED_DT 
  ,ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
   ,EOXRNR.AMOUNT /* enabled this as this is already calculated in EL table */
  ,EOXRNR.ACCTD_AMOUNT  /* enabled this as this is already calculated in EL table */
  ,NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  ,NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
  ,EOXRNR.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
  ,NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT*100 + NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT as FISCAL_ID
  ,CASE WHEN NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY<0 THEN EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT ELSE EOUGC_REG.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT END AS ORG_ID
  ,CAST(CAST( TRIM(EOXRNR.ATTRIBUTE2) AS VARCHAR(18) ) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS INVOICE_PERCENT
  
  ,EOXRNR.CURRENCY_CODE AS TRXL_CURR_CODE
  ,CASE WHEN NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY<0 THEN NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY ELSE NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY END AS SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
  ,'REV' AS ACCOUNT_CLASS
  ,COALESCE(NATIL.RU_PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,NATFL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY) AS RU_PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  ,'N' AS XAAS_OA_FLAG
  ,-999 AS SK_TRX_ID_INT
  ,-999 AS SK_PREVIOUS_TRX_ID_INT
    ,EOXRNR.SOURCE_DATA_KEY5
  ,EOXRNR.TSV_FLAG
  ,EOXRNR.MERAKI_FLAG
 FROM
  /* $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_MONTH_PROCESS_DATE EAMPD, */
  $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM ,
  $$EXCEPDB.EX_NCR_RAE_REV_CUR_RAO EOXRNR
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
   ON EOXRNR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_RAE_NET_REVENUE SRNR
   ON EOXRNR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID = SRNR.SK_NET_REVENUE_ID
   AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SRNR.SS_CD
   AND EOXRNR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID = SRNR.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID
   
   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RAO_XXCFI_RAE_NET_REVENUE EL
   ON EOXRNR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID = EL.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID
   AND EOXRNR.GLOBAL_NAME = EL.GLOBAL_NAME
   
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
   ON SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT  = EOXRNR.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID 
   AND SATL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
  INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
   ON SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
   ON NATL.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
 INNER JOIN (SELECT  CASE WHEN NSOLV.SK_ORIGINAL_LINE_REF_NUM=(-999) THEN CAST(NSOL_INIT.BK_LINE_REF_NUM AS BIGINT)
        ELSE NSOLV.SK_ORIGINAL_LINE_REF_NUM  END AS ORIGINAL_LINE_REF_NUM,
        NSOL_INIT.BK_LINE_REF_NUM,NSOL_INIT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
        FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV NSOLV
        INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL_INIT
        ON NSOLV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSOL_INIT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
        AND NSOLV.END_TV_DTM='3500-01-01 00:00:00') NSOL1
        ON EL.TSV_LINE_REF_NUM=CAST(NSOL1.BK_LINE_REF_NUM AS BIGINT)
  INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL_FINAL
  ON NSOL1.ORIGINAL_LINE_REF_NUM=CAST(NSOL_FINAL.BK_LINE_REF_NUM AS BIGINT)
  INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO
  ON NSOL_FINAL.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY  
  
  INNER JOIN (SELECT SK_LINE_REF_NUM,PRODUCT_KEY,ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,MIN(ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT) AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT      
  FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ACCRUED_REV_TRX  WHERE ATTRIBUTION_CD='STANDALONE' GROUP BY 1,2,3) NART
  ON EL.TSV_LINE_REF_NUM=NART.SK_LINE_REF_NUM

  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS 
   ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT
   ON NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
   AND NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
   AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
      ON NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = EOXRNR.LEDGER_ID
      AND NSOB.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE   /*  Added as part of XLA */
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY  EOUGC_REG
   ON NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE= EOUGC_REG.BK_COMPANY_CODE              
   AND NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY    = EOUGC_REG.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
   AND NAT.AR_TRX_KEY>0
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY  EOUGC
   ON NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY= EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
   AND NAT.AR_TRX_KEY<0   
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT  ENGLA    /*  Modified to XLA joins */
       ON (ENGLA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = EOXRNR.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
       AND ENGLA.GLOBAL_NAME = EOXRNR.GLOBAL_NAME )
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
   ON NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_FREIGHT_LINE NATFL
   ON NATFL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
  WHERE 1=1 /* EOXRNR.GL_POSTED_DATE IS NOT NULL */
  AND EL.GL_POSTED_DATE IS NOT NULL
  AND COALESCE(EL.GL_POSTED_FLAG, 'N') = 'Y'
   AND(NAT.AR_TRX_COMPLETE_FLAG = 'Y'  OR NAT.AR_TRX_KEY<0)
  AND EOXRNR.GLOBAL_NAME  = 'CG' 
  /* AND EOXRNR.GL_DATE BETWEEN NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE and NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE */
  AND EL.GL_DATE BETWEEN NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE and NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE
  AND (EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT IS NOT NULL OR EOUGC_REG.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT IS NOT NULL)
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_LEDGER EAL WHERE EOXRNR.LEDGER_ID = EAL.LEDGER_ID) 
   AND  NOT EXISTS 
              ( SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV DRVDR 
      WHERE DRVDR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY = SRNR.NET_REVENUE_KEY
      AND DRVDR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='RAE_REVENUE')
   AND NOT EXISTS 
             ( SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_BKG DRVDBKG  
     WHERE DRVDBKG.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY = SRNR.NET_REVENUE_KEY
     AND DRVDBKG.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='RAE_REVENUE')
/* AND NATL.RU_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_FLG <>'Y'*/ /*Added as part of Q1FY16-Offer Attribution to restrict XAAS data*/
 AND EOXRNR.XAAS_OFFER_ATTRIB_FLG<>'Y'/*Added as part of Q1FY16-Offer Attribution to restrict XAAS data*/       
 AND EOXRNR.TSV_FLAG='Y' /*ACRL CHANGES*/

SELECT
 EOXRNR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID 
 ,NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
 ,NAT.BK_AR_TRX_NUMBER              
 ,NAT.AR_TRX_DATETIME
 ,NAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT
 ,NULL AS CONTEXT 
 ,NAT.RU_BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_KEY         
 ,NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE 
 ,NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE,           
 /*START: Added as part of CF-LSS Q3FY15  */
 /*NAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,*/
 CASE WHEN NATL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY > 0  THEN NATL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
             ELSE NAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
 END as SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 /*END: Added as part of CF-LSS Q3FY15  */        
 NAT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
 ,NAT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
 /*,NAT.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE */     
 ,EOXRNR.CURRENCY_CODE AS TRXL_CURR_CODE
 ,EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE   
 ,NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE
 ,NAT.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLG
 ,NATL.BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
 ,NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
 ,CASE WHEN NATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE = 'LINE' THEN NATIL.PRODUCT_KEY  WHEN NATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE = 'FREIGHT' THEN NATFL.PRODUCT_KEY ELSE NULL  END ITEM_KEY
 ,NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE 
 ,NATIL.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME  
 ,NATIL.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE 
 ,NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME          
 /* ,CAST(EOXRNR.GL_DATE AS DATE) AS  GL_DATE */
 ,CAST(EOXRNR.GL_DATE AS DATE) AS  GL_DATE
 ,NATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE
 ,CAST(EOXRNR.DV_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS REV_PCT
 /* ,EOXRNR.GL_POSTED_DATE AS  GL_POSTED_DATE  */
 ,EOXRNR.GL_POSTED_DATE AS GL_POSTED_DT 
 ,ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
  ,EOXRNR.DV_AMOUNT AS AMOUNT /* enabled this as this is already calculated in EL table */
 ,EOXRNR.DV_ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT AS ACCTD_AMOUNT  /* enabled this as this is already calculated in EL table */
 /*,(COALESCE(EXDLA.UNROUNDED_ENTERED_CR,0) - COALESCE(EXDLA.UNROUNDED_ENTERED_DR,0) ) AS AMOUNT 
 ,(COALESCE(EXDLA.UNROUNDED_ACCOUNTED_CR,0) - COALESCE(EXDLA.UNROUNDED_ACCOUNTED_DR,0)) ACCTD_AMOUNT */
 ,NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
 ,NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
 ,EOXRNR.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
 ,EAMPD.FISCAL_ID
 ,EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT AS ORG_ID
 ,CAST(CAST( TRIM(EOXRNR.DV_PERCENT) AS VARCHAR(18) ) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS INVOICE_PERCENT
 /*ADDED THE FOLLOWING COLUMNS IN CURSOR*/
 ,EOXRNR.CURRENCY_CODE AS TRXL_CURR_CODE
 /*,NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY */
 ,NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
 ,'REV' AS ACCOUNT_CLASS
 /* OA Q1FY15 changes */
